Ten years ago, 𝐓𝐇𝐄 𝐌𝐎𝐍𝐒𝐓𝐄𝐑𝐒 began as a single sketch, sparked by light and imagination. Ten years later, carrying the memories we’ve held close, 𝐓𝐇𝐄 𝐌𝐎𝐍𝐒𝐓𝐄𝐑𝐒 comes back—together with us. ✨ 𝐓𝐇𝐄 𝐌𝐎𝐍𝐒𝐓𝐄𝐑𝐒 𝟏𝟎𝐭𝐡 𝐀𝐧𝐧𝐢𝐯𝐞𝐫𝐬𝐚𝐫𝐲 𝐒𝐞𝐫𝐢𝐞𝐬 𝐅𝐢𝐠𝐮𝐫𝐞𝐬 𝐑𝐞𝐥𝐞𝐚𝐬𝐞 𝐝𝐚𝐭𝐞: 𝐉𝐚𝐧.𝟑𝟎𝐭𝐡.𝟐𝟎𝟐𝟔 To determine the local release time, please refer to the local POP MART account or channel in each respective country or region. #POPMART #LABUBU10Yearsanniversary #THEMONSTERS #labubu #blindbox
